title: Dialog
description: A window overlaid on either the primary window or another dialog window, built on Radix UI Dialog.

manual.title: Install dependencies
manual.description: Install the Radix UI dialog primitive.

manual.title: Add utility function
manual.description: Create a cn utility function if you don't have one already.

manual.title: Copy the component code
manual.description: Create a new file and paste the dialog component code.

usage.import: import { Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogClose } from '@repo/components';

examples.title: Default
examples.description: A basic dialog with title, description, and action buttons.
examples.code:
import { Button, Dialog, DialogClose, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger, } from "@repo/components"; export default function DialogDemo() { return ( Dialog Title This is a dialog component. Use it to display important information or ask for user confirmation.

Dialog body content goes here. You can place any content inside.

); }

examples.title: Sizes
examples.description: Control dialog width with the size prop: sm, md (default), lg, xl.

examples.title: With Form
examples.description: A dialog containing an editable form with controlled open state.
examples.code:
"use client"; import { useState } from "react"; import { Button, Dialog, DialogClose, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger, Input, Label, } from "@repo/components"; export default function DialogWithForm() { const [open, setOpen] = useState(false); function handleSave() { setOpen(false); } return ( Edit Profile Update your profile information. Click save when you're done.
); }

examples.title: Scrollable
examples.description: A dialog with scrollable content for long body text.
examples.code:
import { Button, Dialog, DialogClose, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger, } from "@repo/components"; export default function DialogScrollable() { return ( Terms of Service Please read through the full terms before accepting.
{Array.from({ length: 8 }).map((_, i) => (

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.

))}
); }
